newsSince: YOFC's headline event - the world-first 800G hollow-core fibre test network with China Mobile - was unveiled June 6 (just before this window) and is already reflected in the prior case. No new order/contract news in June 9-23. The ~+3.6% move is muted versus its +405% YTD; the hollow-core AI-era story is real but fully discovered.

sources.label: Yicai Global - YOFC bets on hollow-core fiber for AI

Yicai Global - YOFC bets on hollow-core fiber for AI era

verdicts.rankRationale: Down. +405% YTD and no identifiable new fundamental catalyst since June 9 keep compressing residual alpha on this crowding-sensitive under-owned-bottleneck list. The HCF/AI-fiber story is real but fully discovered and richly priced; the discovery discount this page targets is essentially gone.
verdicts.bull: HCF latency/loss leadership; AI data centers need 2-4x more fiber; first-mover in commercial hollow-core.
verdicts.neutral: Strong tech, but the optics demand story is consensus now.
verdicts.bear: +405% YTD on no fresh news; extreme rerating leaves no margin of safety on an under-owned-alpha lens.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: HCF commercialization in AI data centers
